# tjs-lang

> A typed JavaScript platform: TJS (a TS-like language with runtime type validation), AJS (a gas-metered VM for executing untrusted agent code), and a single-pass toolchain (transpile + lint + test + docs). Types survive to runtime as contracts, examples, and tests. Inline WASM, monadic errors, safe eval, capability-based sandboxing.

This file is a navigation index for AI agents. It does not contain the docs themselves — it points to them. Read the linked files in the order suggested below.

## Read this first (avoids the #1 LLM mistake)

- [CLAUDE-TJS-SYNTAX.md](CLAUDE-TJS-SYNTAX.md) — TJS syntax reference. Critical: `function foo(x: 'default')` is NOT a TypeScript string-literal type. The colon value is an **example**; `'default'` widens to `string`. LLMs get this wrong constantly.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) — project overview, common commands, architecture, security model, and key APIs.
- [PRINCIPLES.md](PRINCIPLES.md) — **non-negotiable language invariants**: options-off TJS ⊇ JS, and TJS ⊇ AJS. A richer layer may do *more* with the same source but must never make subset-legal code illegal (e.g. un-runnable signature tests are inconclusive, not errors). The opt-in unit is the **dialect**: `tjs(src, { dialect: 'js' })` preserves plain-JS semantics, `'tjs'` (default) is native; file tools map extension→dialect via `dialectForFilename`/`sourceKindForFilename` from `tjs-lang/lang`. TypeScript routes through `fromTS` (`tjs-lang/lang/from-ts`) so the lean lang bundle stays TS-free — the full `js | ts | tjs` routing recipe is in PRINCIPLES.md. A violation is a bug.

## Language guides

- [DOCS-TJS.md](DOCS-TJS.md) — TJS language guide (the long form).
- [DOCS-AJS.md](DOCS-AJS.md) — AJS runtime guide (gas-metered sandboxed VM).
- [TJS-FOR-JS.md](TJS-FOR-JS.md) — for JavaScript developers: syntax differences, gotchas.
- [TJS-FOR-TS.md](TJS-FOR-TS.md) — for TypeScript developers: migration, interop, what changes.
- [guides/tjs.md](guides/tjs.md) and [guides/ajs.md](guides/ajs.md) — usage-oriented walkthroughs.
- [guides/patterns.md](guides/patterns.md) — common patterns and idioms.
- [guides/tjs-examples.md](guides/tjs-examples.md) — annotated example programs.
- [guides/footguns.md](guides/footguns.md) — JS footguns TJS quietly fixes (boxed-primitive coercion, ==/!=, typeof null, uninitialized let, etc.).
- [guides/playground-imports.md](guides/playground-imports.md) — how the playground resolves `import` statements: TFS service worker, default JSDelivr `/+esm`, esm.sh allowlist for React, CDN hints (`jsdelivr/`, `esmsh/`, `unpkg/`, `github/`), full-URL passthrough.
- [guides/ajs-llm-prompt.md](guides/ajs-llm-prompt.md) — prompt template for asking LLMs to write AJS.

## Architecture and internals

- [CONTEXT.md](CONTEXT.md) — architecture deep dive (two-layer design, atom system, value resolution).
- [docs/function-predicate-design.md](docs/function-predicate-design.md) — Type / Generic / FunctionPredicate design.
- [docs/generic-dts-design.md](docs/generic-dts-design.md) — `.d.ts` generation from TJS.
- [docs/WASM-QUICKSTART.md](docs/WASM-QUICKSTART.md) — inline WASM, SIMD, `wasmBuffer()` (5-minute intro).
- [DOCS-WASM.md](DOCS-WASM.md) — canonical WASM reference: both inline `wasm{}` blocks and top-level `wasm function` declarations, memory model, cross-file composition (Phase 3), boundary distribution form (Phase 4), tjs-lang/linalg, current limitations.
- [wasm-library-plan.md](wasm-library-plan.md) — cross-file WASM library design + phased implementation history. Shipped in v0.8.0; see plan for what's deferred.
- [docs/native-engine-integration.md](docs/native-engine-integration.md) — embedding into a native runtime.
- [docs/universal-endpoint.md](docs/universal-endpoint.md) — isomorphic atoms: the same agent and one security model running in the data center and in the browser client.
- [docs/type-system-north-star.md](docs/type-system-north-star.md) — **the type-system north star**: JSON-Schema + `$predicate` as the single source of truth for types, the decision lens ("does this get us closer or further?"), and the portable predicate-VM that unlocks it. Strategic, possibly post-1.0.
- [docs/ambient-contracts.md](docs/ambient-contracts.md) — probing real ambient environments (DOM/host objects) to derive serializable verified-predicate *contracts*, plus a conformance harness for stand-ins.
- [docs/dictionary-defaults.md](docs/dictionary-defaults.md) — design spec for merge-on-partial object arguments (WebIDL-dictionary semantics for options bags): a gated native-TJS mode, hoisted pure templates, check-then-fill runtime, and the finding that member-level object-param validation doesn't exist yet (Stage 0). Spike A lives in `experiments/dictionary-defaults/`.
- [benchmarks.md](benchmarks.md) — top-level benchmark results (see also [guides/benchmarks.md](guides/benchmarks.md)).
- [MEMORY-PROFILE.md](MEMORY-PROFILE.md) — memory and speed of transpilation under bun vs node: what `fromTS` actually calls (parser + emitter, never a type checker), why its footprint is bounded, the bun/node allocator and startup differences, and how to measure retention without fooling yourself.
- [UPSTREAM.md](UPSTREAM.md) — dependency bugs filed upstream and worked around locally (Bun/tosijs/…); the paper trail for removing each workaround once upstream lands.
- [docs/lm-studio-setup.md](docs/lm-studio-setup.md) — running the LLM test suite locally: install, model loading, and the leaked-VRAM / CORS / audit-cache gotchas.

## Examples and live code

- [examples/](examples/) — standalone `.tjs` example files (`hello.tjs`, `datetime.tjs`, `generic-demo.tjs`, `js-footguns-fixed.tjs`).
- [tjs-src/](tjs-src/) — the TJS runtime, written in TJS itself (self-hosting reference).
- Playground: https://tjs-platform.web.app — try TJS in a browser.

## Package entry points (what to import)

- `tjs-lang` → `src/index.ts` — main entry: `Agent`, `AgentVM`, `ajs`, `tjs`.
- `tjs-lang/lang` → `src/lang/transpiler.ts` — language tools only: `tjs`, `transpile`.
- `tjs-lang/lang/from-ts` → `src/lang/emitters/from-ts.ts` — TypeScript → TJS/JS transpilation.
- `tjs-lang/browser` → `src/lang/browser.ts` (dist `tjs-browser.js`) — **self-contained** TJS/AJS transpiler (acorn + tosijs-schema inlined); `import()` from any CDN, zero config.
- `tjs-lang/browser/from-ts` → `src/lang/browser-from-ts.ts` (dist `tjs-browser-from-ts.js`) — browser TS→TJS; lazy-loads the `typescript` compiler from a CDN (default `https://esm.sh/typescript@5` — the only CDN that serves it reliably; jsDelivr `+esm`/esm.run time out). Override with `fromTS(src, { typescriptUrl })` or preload `globalThis.__TJS_TS__`.
- `tjs-lang/vm` → `src/vm/index.ts` — VM and atoms.
- `tjs-lang/eval` → `src/lang/eval.ts` — `Eval`, `SafeFunction`.
- `tjs-lang/batteries` → `src/batteries/index.ts` — LM Studio integration (lazy, local-only).
- `tjs-lang/linalg` → `src/linalg/index.tjs` — SIMD linear-algebra kernels (`dot`, `norm_sq`, `dot_at`, `norm_sq_at`).
- `tjs-lang/css` → `src/css/index.ts` — CSS validators built from verified-safe predicates: colors (`isColor`, `isColorValue`), dimensions (`isLength`, `isAngle`, `isTime`, …), order-flexible shorthands (`isAnimation`, `isTransition`), style objects (`isStyleObject`, `isStyleValueFor`), plus `suggestColor` and `verifyCss`. The predicate-types thesis made real.
- `tjs-lang/schema` → `src/schema/index.ts` — tosijs-schema pre-wired with `$predicate` support (auto-registers the predicate engine on import). Drop-in for `tosijs-schema`; needs `tosijs-schema@^1.4.0`.
- `tjs-lang/import-resolver` → `src/import-resolver/index.ts` — bundler-free bare imports in the browser (#20): `rewriteImports` bare specifiers to a same-origin prefix, `registerImportResolver` a service worker that resolves them to a CDN (JSDelivr `/+esm` default, esm.sh allowlist, `jsdelivr/`·`esmsh/`·`unpkg/`·`github/` hints) and caches. Powers the playground; see `guides/playground-imports.md`.
- `tjs-lang/import-resolver/worker` → `dist/import-resolver-worker.js` — the service worker itself, as a raw classic-script asset. Copy it to your origin's public root (a SW is origin-scoped; from a subdirectory you also need `Service-Worker-Allowed: /`).
- `tjs-lang/runtime` → `src/lang/runtime.ts` — the TJS runtime (`createRuntime`, `installRuntime`, `Eq`/`NotEq`/`Is`/`IsNot`/`TypeOf`, `checkType`, `isMonadicError`) for emitted `.tjs` code + downstream integrations. Also the **flight recorder**: `errors()` (type errors only — the assertion surface) and `record()`/`records(filter?)`/`getDroppedCount()` (everything the runtime noticed, incl. wasm fallbacks, `wasmBuffer` copy penalties, and VM fuel/timeout/capability failures). Records liberally — a false alarm costs a ring slot, a missing entry costs a debugging session — and never changes program behavior.
- `tjs-lang/bun-plugin` → `src/bun-plugin/tjs-plugin.ts` — Bun `onLoad` plugin for native `.tjs` imports (bun-only; `preload` it in bunfig.toml).
- `tjs-lang/editors` → `editors/index.ts` — **framework-free** editor primitives (acorn only, no CodeMirror/Monaco/Ace): `collectScopeSymbols` (AST-based scope extraction — handles destructuring, which line-based scrapers miss — with an `origin` on each symbol so a consumer can introspect the *real* value), `introspectValue`/`INTROSPECT_VALUE_SOURCE`, and `scopeCaptureEpilogue` (capture a run's top-level bindings in-run, so member completion needs no re-execution and doubles no side effects). Use this when building your own editor integration or embedding live examples.
- `tjs-lang/editors/monaco`, `tjs-lang/editors/codemirror`, `tjs-lang/editors/ace` → syntax highlighting (bundled from `editors/{monaco,codemirror,ace}/*.ts` by `scripts/build-editors.ts`).

## Source map (for code-reading agents)

- `src/lang/parser.ts` — TJS parser (colon shorthand, safety markers, return-type extraction).
- `src/lang/parser-transforms.ts` — Type / Generic / FunctionPredicate block transforms.
- `src/lang/emitters/js.ts` — emits JavaScript with `__tjs` metadata.
- `src/lang/emitters/from-ts.ts` — TypeScript → TJS/JS, including class metadata.
- `src/lang/emitters/dts.ts` — `.d.ts` generation.
- `src/lang/runtime.ts` — TJS runtime: monadic errors, `checkType`, `createRuntime`.
- `src/lang/inference.ts` — infer `TypeDescriptor` from example values.
- `src/lang/json-schema.ts` — JSON Schema from `TypeDescriptor`.
- `src/lang/predicate.ts` — the predicate-safety verifier: certifies a cluster of pure, synchronous, composable predicates (reads each atom's `effects` tag), compiles verified ones to native JS, and mines them for autocomplete via `suggest()`. Exported from `tjs-lang/lang`.
- `src/lang/predicate-schema.ts` — the `$predicate` JSON-Schema keyword (computational types): structure for naive validators, `$predicate` for aware ones. Progressive enhancement.
- `src/lang/core.ts` — transpiler core **without** the TypeScript dependency (import from here, not `./index`, to keep the TS compiler out of a bundle).
- `src/lang/dialect.ts` — dialect resolution + `dialectForFilename`/`sourceKindForFilename`; where the modes-on/off decision lives.
- `src/lang/wasm.ts` — WASM bytecode emission. Multi-function module composition; wasm-to-wasm `call <index>` resolution; per-function index map for cross-call resolution (v0.8.0).
- `src/lang/emitters/js-wasm.ts` — JS bootstrap emitter for compiled wasm modules (one `WebAssembly.compile` per file).
- `src/lang/module-loader.ts` — transpile-time `.tjs`/`.ts`/`.js` module loader; used by cross-file `wasm function` composition (v0.8.0).
- `src/linalg/index.tjs` — `tjs-lang/linalg` stdlib source (v0.8.0).
- `src/lang/linter.ts` — static analysis (unused vars, unreachable code).
- `src/vm/runtime.ts` — atom implementations, expression sandboxing, fuel charging (security-critical, ~3000 lines).
- `src/vm/vm.ts` — `AgentVM` class.
- `src/vm/atoms/` — individual atom definitions; `batteries.ts` has LLM/vector/store atoms.
- `src/builder.ts` — fluent `TypedBuilder` API for constructing AST without source.
- `src/cli/tjs.ts` — CLI: `check`, `run`, `types`, `emit`, `convert`, `test`.

## Common gotchas

- `tjs(source)` returns `{ code, types, metadata, testResults, ... }`. Use `.code` for the transpiled JS string.
- Errors are `MonadicError` (check with `isMonadicError()`), not native `Error`. Errors are returned, not thrown.
- AJS: `null.foo.bar` returns `undefined` (uses `?.` semantics) — does NOT throw like JS.
- AJS: computed member access with variables (`items[i]`) is a transpile-time error; use `.map`/`.reduce` atoms.
- Native TJS has all safety modes ON by default. `TjsCompat` disables them. `fromTS` output has them OFF unless `TjsStrict` is added.

## Tracking and process

- [TODO.md](TODO.md) — open work, organized by area. Move done items to the **Completed** section.
- [PLAN.md](PLAN.md) — roadmap.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) — per-release notes (Keep a Changelog). Add an entry under a new version at release time.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — session-completion checklist (canonical). Hard rule: not done until `git push` succeeds.
- [README.md](README.md) — public-facing pitch.
- [MANIFESTO-BUILDER.md](MANIFESTO-BUILDER.md) and [MANIFESTO-ENTERPRISE.md](MANIFESTO-ENTERPRISE.md) — positioning docs (audience-targeted pitches: the individual builder, and the enterprise).
